title: HetznerNetworkAttachment
description: Attaches a Server to a Network via the attach_to_network action.

serverId.description: ID of the Server to attach to the Network.

networkId.description: ID of the Network to attach the Server to.

ip.description: IP to assign to the Server. If not provided, an IP will be auto-assigned.

aliasIps.description: Additional IPs to assign to the Server.

ipRange.description: Subnet CIDR to auto-assign IP from. Must be a subnet of the Network.
